news.headline: BOSS Money offers zero-fee transfers for holidays, welcoming new customers with 5 free transfers to Mexico and 2 to other destinations.
news.summary: Following a highly successful November, BOSS Money is offering a special promotion for new customers. They will enjoy five free transfers to Mexico and two free transfers to all other destinations. This initiative is part of a strategy to attract more clients after a period of outstanding growth.

news.headline: Tactical Resources Corp. amends agreement with Plum Acquisition Corp. III for business combination.
news.summary: A mineral exploration and development company, Tactical Resources Corp., has recently reached an agreement with Plum Acquisition Corp. III. The amendment to the original agreement seeks to enhance their strategic partnership for future projects. The amendment outlines new terms and conditions regarding joint ventures and investment opportunities, aiming to boost growth and profitability. This agreement signifies a significant milestone for Tactical Resources Corp., as it opens up new avenues for expansion and development. The partnership is expected to bring about exciting ventures, with both companies pooling resources and expertise.

news.headline: AnaptysBio's trial of ANB032 for atopic dermatitis did not meet endpoints in 201-patient study. No safety concerns found.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, AnaptysBio, Inc. shared in a press release that their investigational drug ANB032, classified as a BTLA agonist, did not achieve the set primary and secondary goals across varying doses in the ARISE-AD trial. This global trial involved 201 patients and aimed to assess ANB032 as a standalone treatment for moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis (AD) or eczema. Results indicated that ANB032, while well-tolerated with no apparent safety concerns, fell short in meeting the specified endpoints. The company, known for its focus on developing innovative immunology therapeutics, expressed these outcomes without providing detailed numbers on the trial results or effectiveness.

news.headline: Aprea Therapeutics shifts to twice daily dosing in ABOYA-119 trial of ATRN-119 to improve clinical outcomes.
news.summary: A dosing regimen of Aprea's experimental drug, ATRN-119, administered twice daily (BID) is anticipated to enhance patient outcomes by ensuring optimal drug activity throughout a 24-hour period. This strategic dosing approach aims to maximize the drug's therapeutic benefits for patients.

news.headline: Enlivex approved for Phase I trial of Allocetra for TMJ osteoarthritis in Israel; study to assess safety and efficacy. (Character count: 116)
news.summary: In Ness-Ziona, Israel, on December 11, 2024, Enlivex Therapeutics Ltd. (Nasdaq: ENLV) shared news. The Israeli Ministry of Health gave approval for an investigator-initiated Phase I trial. This trial will assess Allocetra™ safety, tolerability, and initial efficacy when injected into the temporomandibular joint (TMJ) of patients with TMJ osteoarthritis. This marks a significant step forward for the clinical-stage macrophage reprogramming immunotherapy company.

news.headline: La Rosa Holdings, with NASDAQ: LRHC, opens first office in North Carolina; a holding company of six real estate segments.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, in Celebration, Florida, La Rosa Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: LRHC) revealed the launch of its inaugural office in North Carolina. The company acts as a holding entity for six agent-focused real estate segments that leverage technology and cloud-based solutions. This expansion marks a significant milestone for La Rosa, further expanding its reach and services to a new market.

news.headline: Alpha Tau is set to present at 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference, discussing achievements and upcoming data milestones.
news.summary: The upcoming overview presentation will delve into the Company's recent accomplishments and provide insights into the future with a focus on upcoming data milestones.

news.headline: Foremost Clean Energy issues shareholder letter, highlights Denison transaction. Uranium/lithium co. on the rise.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Foremost Clean Energy Ltd. (NASDAQ: FMST, CSE: FAT) based in Vancouver, British Columbia, released a shareholder letter from its President and CEO, Jason Barnard. The company focuses on uranium and lithium exploration in North America.

news.headline: Gain Therapeutics will present at Biotech Showcase in 2025, highlighting drug candidate GT-02287 and its Magellan Drug Discovery Platform.
news.summary: Upcoming presentation will showcase the lead drug candidate GT-02287 and Magellan drug discovery platform. GT-02287 is a promising drug candidate in the pipeline, with significant potential for addressing unmet medical needs. The innovative Magellan drug discovery platform has been instrumental in the development of GT-02287, streamlining the discovery process and enhancing success rates. The presentation will delve into the key attributes of GT-02287 and highlight the capabilities of the Magellan platform in advancing drug discovery. This event is anticipated to attract a broad audience, including investors, researchers, and industry professionals, keen on learning more about this groundbreaking drug candidate and revolutionary discovery platform. Be sure not to miss this informative session.

US Core CPI YoY Actual 3.3% (Forecast 3.3%, Previous 3.3%)

Immokalee Water & Sewer District in Florida partners with Xylem for digital transformation, remote meter management, water quality tracking, and more.
news.summary: In Collier County, Florida, the Immokalee Water & Sewer District has chosen Xylem (NYSE: XYL) and Core & Main (NYSE: CNM) to drive its digital transformation effort. This includes managing meters remotely, monitoring residential water pressure, ensuring water quality, and other tasks utilizing Xylem's digital solutions. The initiative aims to establish a unified water management system encompassing potable water distribution, wastewater collection, and treatment systems.

news.headline: New Fortress Energy signs 10-year charter for Energos Eskimo, a 160,000 m3 unit, to EGAS in Egypt. Operations to start in 2025.
news.summary: In New York, New Fortress Energy Inc. (NASDAQ: NFE) announced a 10-year charter agreement for the Energos Eskimo, a 160,000 m3 floating storage and regasification unit, with the Egyptian Natural Gas Holding Company (“EGAS”). The vessel will operate at EGAS' LNG import terminal in Ain Sokhna, Egypt, starting in the summer of 2025. New Fortress Energy Inc. (NASDAQ: NFE) is a worldwide energy company.

news.headline: Report analyzes global e-commerce in mattress industry with focus on North America, Europe, Asia Pacific. Covers key players like Casper, Emma, IKEA. Research includes latest data & stats on online mattress sales.
news.summary: A report titled "E-commerce in the Mattress Industry" has been recently included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report provides a comprehensive analysis of the online mattress market, particularly concentrating on North America, Europe, and Asia Pacific regions. It presents the latest data and statistics pertaining to the sector. The report delves into the significant retail mattress markets globally and provides estimations regarding the current prevalence of online mattress sales in key countries.

news.headline: Quantum Lifecycle Partners acquires DCR Systems Group to expand electronics lifecycle management services in Canada.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from Toronto, Quantum Lifecycle, a prominent Canadian IT asset disposition and e-waste recycling company, has acquired DCR. This strategic move aims to enhance their offerings in sustainable electronics lifecycle management services across Canada. The acquisition of DCR will significantly boost Quantum Lifecycle's capabilities in this sector and is expected to have a positive impact on the industry. This development underscores the growing importance of managing electronic waste effectively and efficiently.

news.headline: Golden Grail Beverages (OTC: GOGY) acquires UPDC Beverages in acquisition agreement.
news.summary: Golden Grail Beverages Corp. (stock symbol: GOGY) has recently announced an acquisition deal to buy United Product Development Corporation.

news.headline: SLB wins Petrobras contract for offshore fields in Brazil, to build 100+ deepwater wells with advanced technologies.
news.summary: A global energy technology company, SLB (NYSE: SLB), has secured a new contract from Petrobras (NYSE: PBR) for integrated services in all offshore fields operated by Petrobras in Brazil. Following a competitive tender process, SLB will be responsible for constructing over 100 deepwater wells. This project will involve the deployment of advanced drilling, cementing, and drilling fluids technologies on up to nine ultra-deepwater rigs. The services will mainly be focused in the Campos basin.

news.headline: The commercial & industrial BESS market expected to reach $21.64 billion by 2035 due to solar-plus-storage and new service models.
news.summary: A recent report on the commercial and industrial battery energy storage systems (BESS) industry has been introduced to ResearchAndMarkets.com's platform. Battery energy storage systems have emerged as the quickest growing clean energy technology, primarily due to the expanding wind and solar energy sectors as well as the increasing demand for grid flexibility. Although commercial and industrial BESS installations have historically been slower to develop compared to grid-scale and residential deployments, they are now gaining momentum. The report highlights the rapid growth opportunities in the C&I BESS industry, reflecting the rising trend in clean energy solutions.

news.headline: Beamr, a video optimization tech leader, featured in Nasdaq Amplify Issuer Spotlight. CEO Sharon Carmel interviewed at Nasdaq MarketSite.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, in Herzliya, Israel, Beamr Imaging Ltd. (NASDAQ: BMR), a prominent company specializing in video optimization technology, revealed that their CEO Sharon Carmel was showcased in an interview as part of the Nasdaq Amplify Issuer Spotlight series at the Nasdaq MarketSite.

news.headline: Nov CPI inflation report may prompt hawkish Fed shift for next year despite expected rate cut Dec 18.
news.summary: An upcoming Federal Reserve rate cut is anticipated on December 18th, however, the November Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation report might lead to a more conservative stance for the following year. The CPI inflation report could potentially prompt a more cautious approach by the Federal Reserve in the future.

news.headline: Billionaire Ray Dalio favors Bitcoin over bonds due to looming debt crisis, sees "hard money" like Bitcoin and gold as safer options.
news.summary: A wealthy hedge fund manager has expressed concerns about an impending debt crisis in prominent economies. According to the manager, assets like Bitcoin and gold, known as "hard money," may offer a more secure investment option amidst this uncertainty.

news.headline: Report highlights Top 100 Upholstered Furniture Manufacturers worldwide, analyzing market and profiles 100 producers.
news.summary: A report titled "Top 100 Upholstered Furniture Manufacturers in the World" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report provides insights into the global upholstered furniture market by analyzing and ranking the top 100 producers in the industry. It offers details such as each company's ranking based on upholstered furniture turnover, as well as their respective company names and headquarters locations. This comprehensive report offers a detailed overview of the competitive landscape in the upholstered furniture sector globally.

news.headline: Iran's foreign policy suffers after Assad’s downfall in Syria according to a report by Bloomberg.
Atossa Therapeutics reveals phase 2 study results: (Z)-Endoxifen reduces breast density significantly, 1mg dose shows promise for breast cancer prevention in premenopausal women.
news.summary: A study has found that a 1 milligram dose of (Z)-Endoxifen could be an effective and well-tolerated preventative therapy for premenopausal women who are at risk of developing breast cancer. The research suggests that this dosage could offer significant benefits in reducing the risk of breast cancer in this particular demographic. This finding highlights the potential of (Z)-Endoxifen as a preventive measure, showcasing its promising role in safeguarding premenopausal women from this prevalent form of cancer.

news.headline: Edible Garden to present USDA Organic produce at 2024 NY Produce Show on December 11, 2024 including new Pickle Party line.
news.summary: A company is set to launch a new product line called Pickle Party, featuring kosher and non-GMO pickles. This new line will consist of a variety of pickle products that cater to different tastes and preferences. The company aims to meet the increasing demand for high-quality, natural pickle options among consumers. The Pickle Party line is expected to include classic dill pickles, spicy pickles, and garlic pickles, among others. This move comes in response to the growing popularity of pickles as a healthy and flavorful snack choice. Consumers can look forward to this exciting new product line hitting the shelves soon.

news.headline: Asset Entities Inc. approved as official TikTok Shop Partner, a provider of digital services, raising market visibility.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Asset Entities Inc., a company traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ASST, revealed that it has been designated as an authorized TikTok Shop Partner. This is significant news as TikTok is a major player in the realm of social media platforms globally. Asset Entities Inc. specializes in delivering digital marketing and content services on platforms like Discord, alongside being a Ternary Payment Platform firm. This latest development now positions them to expand their reach and offerings within the lucrative TikTok ecosystem.

news.headline: Corgan expands The Shop to blend craftsmanship with technology, featuring advanced tools like laser cutters and 3D printers.
news.summary: A global architecture and design firm, Corgan, based in Dallas, has unveiled the expansion of The Shop, showcasing a significant advancement in their strategy to merge physical model-making, craftsmanship, and digital fabrication within the design process. This enhanced facility is indicative of Corgan's dedication to sophisticated design, harmonizing traditional craftsmanship with modern technology. Equipped with cutting-edge tools like laser cutters and advanced 3D printers, The Shop highlights Corgan’s persistent commitment to innovation and quality.

news.headline: Amentum to evaluate a potential SMR in Norway, selected by Halden Kjernekraft AS. (NYSE: AMTM) #AmentumWin.
news.summary: In Chantilly, Virginia, Amentum (NYSE: AMTM) and Multiconsult Norge AS have been chosen by Halden Kjernekraft AS to assess the feasibility of constructing a small modular reactor (SMR) in Norway. This initiative aims to aid Halden municipality in determining if nuclear energy can address their evolving energy requirements. The partnership will conduct an evaluation of potential equipment and service providers both domestically and internationally. They will also analyze technical specifications, environmental implications, and other relevant factors. This collaboration highlights a significant step towards developing nuclear energy solutions in Norway.

news.headline: UK's PM Starmer is to meet Apple CEO Tim Cook to discuss investment - PM’s Spokesman.
Two executives invest in Mother Labs' Series A financing at a pre-money valuation of JPY9 billion (approx USD $59 million).
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: MRM) announced that two key executives, Issei Homan (Chief Technology Officer) and Yasuhiro Hayami (Chief Business Officer) of MEDIROM MOTHER Labs Inc., a subsidiary of MEDIROM, have invested in Mother Labs’ Series A financing. The investment was made at a pre-money valuation of approximately JPY9 billion (equivalent to USD $59,000,000 as of December 1, 2024). Homan and Hayami, who are dedicated leaders within Mother Labs, align closely with MEDIROM’s corporate values, vision, and growth strategy.

news.headline: Winners of 2023 Seeding The Future Global Food System Challenge reflect on life changes after receiving a share of $1 million prize.
news.summary: Winners of the 2023 Seeding The Future Global Food System Challenge in Chicago have recently disclosed the impact of winning a portion of the $1 million prize on their lives.

news.headline: YCharts and Designed Securities partner to empower Canadian advisors, enhancing workflows and client engagement.
news.summary: A collaboration has been unveiled between YCharts and Designed Securities in Chicago, aimed at optimizing workflows, boosting client engagement, and supporting Canadian financial advisors. This partnership is expected to significantly impact the industry by enhancing efficiency and effectiveness for advisors.

news.headline: Global trimellitic anhydride market sees robust growth, valued at US$3.2B in 2023, projected to reach US$8.1B by 2034, expanding at 8.8% CAGR. Rising demand in plasticizers, coatings, and adhesives driven by the need for sustainable and high-performance materials in industries like construction and electronics. TMA used for specialty polymers, resins, and high-performance coatings. Industry innovations focus on bio-based alternatives and environmental regulations. Market dynamics include growing demand in plasticizers and coatings, increasing adoption in adhesives and sealants, sustainability trends, and expanding applications in high-performance materials.
news.summary: The global trimellitic anhydride market was valued at US$ 3.2 billion in 2023 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 8.8% from 2024 to 2034, reaching US$ 8.1 billion by the end of the forecast period. The increasing demand for TMA in industries such as plasticizers, coatings, and adhesives is fueling market growth. TMA is utilized in the production of specialty polymers, resins, and high-performance coatings, catering to sectors like automotive, construction, and electronics. The surge in demand for sustainable and high-performance materials, along with the focus on environmental regulations, is leading to innovations in bio-based alternatives, further boosting the adoption of TMA. Plasticizers and coatings industries are major drivers of TMA demand, with its use in applications like flexible PVC, epoxy coatings, adhesives, and sealants. The market is witnessing growth in high-performance materials like polymers and composites, particularly in industries such as aerospace, automotive, and electronics. Environmental regulations are propelling manufacturers towards exploring eco-friendly options, with TMA playing a crucial role in the development of bio-based polyesters and low-VOC coatings. This shift towards sustainability is expected to create new growth opportunities in the trimellitic anhydride market in the foreseeable future.

news.headline: Torrent Laboratory in California achieves DoD and DOE 6.0 accreditation, setting high industry standard.
news.summary: Torrent Laboratory, a leading environmental testing provider in California, based in Milpitas, has achieved accreditation under the Department of Defense (DoD) and Department of Energy (DOE) 6.0 standards. This accreditation establishes Torrent as one of the select few laboratories in the country to meet this stringent benchmark. The accreditation, effective immediately, underscores Torrent's commitment to upholding the highest quality standards in its services.

news.headline: o9 partners with Molson Coors to enhance enterprise planning capabilities. Molson Coors is the fourth-largest beer company worldwide.
news.summary: In Dallas, enterprise software platform provider o9 has partnered with Molson Coors Beverage Company to enhance its integrated business planning with comprehensive enterprise planning tools. Molson Coors, the fourth-largest beer company globally, features renowned brands like Coors Light, Miller Lite, and Molson Canadian. The collaboration aims to support Molson Coors' long-term planning strategy and provide end-to-end planning solutions for its diverse beverage portfolio, including iconic brands like Carling.

news.headline: uShip partners with Bosch L.OS and 150+ others to enhance large goods delivery, boosting services for businesses and consumers by 2025.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, uShip has incorporated over 150 additional partners, such as Bosch L.OS, to enhance the transportation of bulky items for both businesses and consumers.

news.headline: Impinj research finds top supply chain headaches for 2025, emphasizing data accuracy importance.
news.summary: In Seattle, a recent study by Impinj highlights the key challenges faced by supply chain executives. The research emphasizes the critical importance of data accuracy in maintaining the integrity of the supply chain. The study identifies the top concerns that leaders in the industry are grappling with, underscoring the need for improved accuracy in handling data to address these challenges effectively. The insights gleaned from the research shed light on the pressing issues facing supply chain management.

news.headline: Andrew Ferguson will likely be more lenient on mergers than Lina Khan at FTC; expected to maintain tough stance on Big Tech.
news.summary: Andrew Ferguson is anticipated to adopt a more lenient stance on mergers compared to the current chief, Lina Khan. However, he may choose to uphold a stringent approach when it comes to regulating Big Tech companies.

news.headline: AI experts John Hopfield, Geoffrey Hinton won Nobel Prizes in Physics. Demis Hassabis, John Jumper honored in Chemistry.
news.summary: John Hopfield and Geoffrey Hinton, two prominent figures in the field of artificial intelligence, have recently been awarded Nobel Prizes in Physics for their exceptional contributions to the field. Additionally, Demis Hassabis and John Jumper were honored with the Chemistry award for their groundbreaking work in neural networks and predicting protein structures. This recognition highlights the significant impact that these individuals have had on their respective fields and emphasizes the growing importance of AI advancements.

news.headline: Lineage, Inc. (NASDAQ: LINE) declared a $0.5275 dividend/share for Q4 2024, to be paid on Jan 21, 2025 to shareholders.
news.summary: In Novi, Michigan, Lineage, Inc. declared a cash dividend of $0.5275 per share for the fourth quarter of 2024. This announcement was made by the Board of Directors of Lineage, Inc., which is recognized as the world's largest global temperature-controlled warehouse Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT). The dividend payment is scheduled for January 21, 2025, and will be distributed to shareholders who hold common stock as of December 31, 2024. Lineage, Inc. is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol LINE and is known for its prominent presence in the temperature-controlled warehouse sector.

news.headline: Easterly Govt. Properties (NYSE: DEA) to attend Jefferies Real Estate Conference 2024 in Miami on Dec 11. Management to take part in investor meetings.
news.summary: Easterly Government Properties, Inc., a REIT specializing in Class A commercial properties leased to the U.S. Government and partners, disclosed its plans to attend the Jefferies Real Estate Conference 2024 in Miami, Florida on December 11, 2024. Traded under NYSE as DEA, Easterly's management will engage in investor meetings at the event. This move aligns with their focus on acquisition, development, and management of such properties. This strategic decision reflects Easterly's commitment to fostering investor relations and exploring growth opportunities.

news.headline: Dynex Capital declares $0.15/share dividend for Common Stock and $0.43125/share dividend for Preferred Stock for Q4 2024.
news.summary: In Glen Allen, Virginia, Dynex Capital, Inc. has announced that they will be issuing a cash dividend of $0.15 per share on their Common Stock (NYSE: DX) for December 2024. Additionally, a quarterly cash dividend of $0.43125 per share will be given for its 6.900% Series C Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock (NYSE: DXPRC) for the fourth quarter of 2024. The dividend for Common Stock will be paid on January 7, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of January 2, 2025.

news.headline: US asking rent fell 0.7% to $1,595, lowest since March 2022 per Redfin report, down 6.2% from all-time high in August.
news.summary: In Seattle, the median U.S. asking rent decreased by 0.7% year over year in November, dropping to $1,595, which is the lowest it has been since March 2022. The report by Redfin revealed that rents also decreased by 1.1% on a month-over-month basis. Rent prices are now 6.2% lower than the peak in August 2022 when it was at $1,700. This indicates an improvement in rental affordability. Notably, November marked the 19th consecutive month of declining rent prices.

news.headline: Amulet Capital invests in innovative tech-enabled primary care management service, Theoria Management in US.
news.summary: A middle-market private equity investment firm, Amulet Capital Partners, LP, has invested in Theoria Management, LLC, which offers tech-enabled management services for providing high-quality, value-based primary care to senior living communities in the U.S. The founder of Theoria is Justin Di Rezze, MD.

news.headline: Convergent Therapeutics adds Barbara Duncan to Board of Directors, specializing in developing radiopharmaceutical therapies for cancer.
news.summary: A company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, Convergent Therapeutics Inc., which is in the clinical stage of development, is dedicated to creating advanced radiopharmaceutical treatments for prostate cancer and various other types of cancer. On December 11, 2024, it publicized the selection of Barbara to a key position within the company.

news.headline: Ora & BlindCAN collaborate with Academy of Music for the Blind in evolution of initiative Blind Canvas Project.
news.summary: In Boston, Ora has unveiled the latest phase of its innovative Blind Canvas Project, done in partnership with the Academy of Music for the Blind (AMB).

news.headline: Edupoint names Northshore School District its 9th annual 'Partner for Life' for tech integration.
news.summary: A company in Mesa, Arizona expressed joy at the district's enthusiastic adoption of technology to benefit students and families. Edupoint® Educational Systems, known for the Synergy® Education Platform used for K-12 student information and learning management, marked this development on December 11, 2024. The platform offers innovative educational solutions to improve the learning experience. This milestone underscores the district's commitment to embracing technology, with the number of students and families benefitting from this initiative reaching significant figures.

news.headline: 2024 Skintuition Report unveiled by BeautyHealth. An insightful look at upcoming skincare trends and statistics.
news.summary: A new report shows that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.6%, marking a decrease of 0.3% from the previous month. The report also revealed that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in various sectors, including healthcare, technology, and retail. Additionally, the average hourly wage saw a slight increase of 2.5% compared to the same time last year. Experts believe that these positive figures indicate a growing and stable economy.
